CVE-2025-6496.title: A vulnerability was found in HTACG tidy-html5 5.8.0. It has been  ...
CVE-2025-6496.description: A vulnerability was found in HTACG tidy-html5 5.8.0. It has been declared as problematic. This vulnerability affects the function InsertNodeAsParent of the file src/parser.c. The manipulation leads to null pointer dereference. Local access is required to approach this attack. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

CVE-2025-6497.title: A vulnerability was found in HTACG tidy-html5 5.8.0. It has been  ...
CVE-2025-6497.description: A vulnerability was found in HTACG tidy-html5 5.8.0. It has been rated as problematic. This issue affects the function prvTidyParseNamespace of the file src/parser.c. The manipulation leads to reachable assertion. Attacking locally is a requirement. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

CVE-2025-6498.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in HTACG ...
CVE-2025-6498.description: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in HTACG tidy-html5 5.8.0. Affected is the function defaultAlloc of the file src/alloc.c. The manipulation leads to memory leak. It is possible to launch the attack on the local host. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
